anti_claim: This Batch-10 capsule accepts exact copied non-secret macro source bodies plus one source-faithful public refactor and deterministic public exercises. It does not claim release approval, publication approval, live Work Ledger truth, neutral benchmark evidence, source mutation authority, private-root equivalence, provider/browser authority, or investment advice.

allowed_public_inputs: public mechanism ids and source-module ids
public negative-case ids and stable error codes
exact copied non-secret macro source modules
source refs, digests, line counts, and required anchors
source-faithful public refactor metadata when private path literals are removed
bounded synthetic exercise inputs and outcomes
forbidden_public_inputs: private home-path literals copied from source
live Work Ledger state as authority
investment advice or live market advice

standard_payload.ontology: A public-safe composite organ that imports Batch-10 governance, compiler, release, finance, dependency, DAG, table, annex, and recent-change macro mechanisms as exact copied macro source bodies plus a private-path-safe public refactor.
standard_payload.teleology: Let a cold reader inspect and rerun representative governance/compiler mechanics without inheriting live ledger, release, publication, provider, browser, market, or private-root authority.
standard_payload.anti_purpose: Receipt-only claims, fixture-only authority, live Work Ledger authority, source mutation, publication or release signaling, private-root equivalence, neutral benchmark claims, or investment advice.
failure_modes: mechanism count drifts from the fourteen Batch-10 target rows without updating fixture, receipts, and docs
passed mechanism count hides the explicitly blocked Batch-9 lane-width binding repair
source module count drifts from thirteen without manifest and test updates
copied source module digest does not match macro source digest
copied source module lacks required anchors
publication manifest selector logic reintroduces private home-path literals instead of the public refactor
runtime exercises stop checking the named source-faithful semantics and become receipt-only checks
negative-case fixtures become verdict authority instead of labels paired to computed mechanism outcomes
receipts include copied body text, raw operator transcripts, provider/browser state, credentials, live ledger state, private paths, or publication/release state

contract_projection_basis.authority_boundary: computed standard-lattice contract only; existing authority_ceiling remains the operative claim ceiling.

validation_rules: require exactly fourteen Batch-10 mechanism rows
require exactly thirteen passed mechanisms and one blocked binding-repair witness
require exactly thirteen copied macro source modules
verify source-to-target digest equality and required anchors for every copied source module
represent publication selector semantics as a source-faithful public refactor with private path literals removed
execute source-faithful public exercises for all thirteen passing mechanisms
require an integrity-matrix row for every mechanism with source relation, claim ceiling, current action, and computed positive/negative behavior
require stable negative-case codes for all fourteen negative cases while treating fixture files as labels, not verdict authority
require every negative-case code to be paired to computed evaluator evidence under exercise.integrity_matrix

keep provider dispatch, browser/HUD authority, live Work Ledger authority, source mutation, publication, release, market advice, private-root equivalence, neutral benchmark, and whole-system correctness authority false
keep copied source bodies under source_modules only; receipts may expose refs, digests, anchors, counts, verdicts, and omission receipts but not body text

author.purpose: create a valid Batch 10 governance compilers capsule instance

refine_instance.purpose: improve an existing Batch 10 governance compilers capsule without corrupting authority

refine_standard_and_propagate.purpose: change std_microcosm_batch10_governance_compilers_capsule and propagate through governed artifacts plus generated lattice projections

source_authority_ref: microcosm-substrate/AXIOMS.md#1 (JSON is contract; Markdown is projection)

doctrine_kind_envelope.note: This standard conforms to the universal doctrine-kind envelope; markdown, Mermaid, Atlas, coverage, health, and entry-card views are generated projections of this JSON source.

anti_claims: This Batch-10 capsule accepts exact copied non-secret macro source bodies plus one source-faithful public refactor and deterministic public exercises. It does not claim release approval, publication approval, live Work Ledger truth, neutral benchmark evidence, source mutation authority, private-root equivalence, provider/browser authority, or investment advice.

Active v2 standard status is a source JSON contract state only; it does not expand release, publication, provider dispatch, private-root equivalence, product-readiness, or whole-system correctness authority beyond the authority_ceiling.

runtime_acceptance_refs.uplift_basis: registry-backed source standard already carried accepted, active, source-body-import, or body-floor status; this update narrows it into the active v2 JSON contract shape without raising its authority ceiling.
